texto: The thrill of falling in love is often the thrill of being loved
autor: the thrill of marriage is the thrill of loving someone for the rest of your life. Each day - and year - that passes is a triumph of this act of loving.
explicacao: Citação de the thrill of marriage is the thrill of loving someone for the rest of your life. Each day - and year - that passes is a triumph of this act of loving. sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “The thrill of falling in love is often the thrill of being loved” articula reflexao, susan-waggoner, thrill em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
